_README: TEMPLATE — run /setup in Claude Code to fill this in, or edit by hand. Keys/structure are fixed; replace the placeholder values with your own. JSON has no comments, so guidance lives in _README / _comment string fields.

user._comment: Your name and home location. Used for display and commute/geo scoring.

compensation._comment: baseSalaryFloor is the minimum the salary high-end must reach. contractAdjustmentFactor accounts for no benefits/bonus/PTO. Set to your own numbers.
compensation.notes: baseSalaryFloor is the minimum the salary high-end must reach. contractAdjustmentFactor accounts for no benefits/bonus/PTO.

geo._comment: homeCity/homeState drive commute estimates for onsite/hybrid roles. Leave homeCity empty to disable commute scoring (remote-only). commuteFail=flag warns but still alerts; set to 'reject' to drop over-limit commutes.
geo.notes: commuteFail=flag means over-limit commutes get a warning but still alert.

search._comment: LinkedIn search queries (only used if Apify is configured). Replace keywords with your own role terms. The ATS scraper uses wideScraper.titleKeywords below, not these.

metadataFilter._comment: Tuning for which LinkedIn postings get a full description fetch. Only used with Apify.

wideScraper._comment: titleKeywords are the substrings the free ATS scraper matches job titles against (case-insensitive). Replace with terms relevant to the roles you want.
